subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter hath arrived. It was indeed certain that the Minister of State would become the object of fierce retribution and severe chastisement [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید مشیرالممالک یقین بود که مورد نقمت و عذاب شدید
subcodes.subjects: @justice and wrath of God, @promotion of commerce and industry
